title: acinos alpinus subsp. majoranifolius
intro: Acinos alpinus subsp. majoranifolius, also known as alpine acinos or majoranifolius acinos, is a subspecies of the Acinos alpinus plant, a small perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in essential oils and flavonoids, providing a range of health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Acinos alpinus subsp. majoranifolius can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
